overall.description: First-person exploration of a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis at night, featuring towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 shows the player character walking through Night City's urban canyon, briefly looking up at the dizzying array of lights before entering a covered underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked commercial street with holographic billboards

events.description: futuristic white car drives past on the wet street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk through the neon-lit canyon of skyscrapers, passing street vendors and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket walking opposite direction on the sidewalk
futuristic white sedan driving past on the wet road

entered.detail: tall dark building with vertical windows and 'DEJAMAS' signage
towering digital advertisements and neon signs covering the skyscrapers
tall black pole with bright white street light illuminating the rain
concrete barriers with yellow stripes separating sidewalk from the street
dense cluster of red and blue neon signs on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk in a dense cyberpunk urban canyon, with the DEJAMAS building on the left and towering holographic billboards on the right. The street is lined with yellow concrete barriers and illuminated by bright street lights cutting through the rain. A pedestrian in a blue jacket walks past in the opposite direction as a futuristic white car drives by on the wet road.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical canyon view of skyscrapers and overhead structures

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and neon signs above
camera tilts back down to forward-facing position

agents.ego_description: tilting head up to gaze at the towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, then returning to forward view

entered.detail: large curved metal framework spanning between buildings overhead
large white billboard with red 'NICOLA' text and portrait

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a dizzying view of the cyberpunk skyline, showing the arched metal structure spanning between buildings and the massive NICOLA billboard. The holographic advertisements that were on the right now fill the center of the frame as the perspective shifts to vertical. After gazing at the towering lights, the camera returns to street level.

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the concrete overpass, leaving the open street
black futuristic car drives past under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass where the environment becomes more enclosed and sheltered from the rain

notable_agents.action: black futuristic car driving under the overpass with headlights on

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with yellow structural beams overhead
glowing green cross medical sign on building facade
thick concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Entering the sheltered space beneath the concrete overpass, the lighting shifts to artificial as the neon signs disappear from view. The green medical sign glows on the left wall while concrete pillars line the walkway. A black car drives past on the right as the path continues deeper under the highway structure, protected from the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-drenched urban canyon that transitions from a neon-lit street into a sheltered concrete underpass. It begins by moving along a wet sidewalk past the DEJAMAS building and yellow concrete barriers, where a pedestrian in a blue jacket and a futuristic white car pass through the glow of street lights. As the camera tilts upward, the perspective shifts vertically to reveal a dizzying skyline dominated by an arched metal structure and a massive NICOLA billboard. The view then returns to street level, moving forward until the open city gives way to the artificial lighting of a covered overpass. Finally, the neon advertisements disappear as the camera passes a glowing green medical sign and concrete pillars, moving deeper beneath the highway structure and away from the rain.
